creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
My <http://localhost:1313/publish/> is unaffected by redirection. 

For posterity, <https://people.freebsd.org/~grahamperrin/273360/> includes: 

* a non-paginated PNG screenshot of how <https://www.freebsd.org/publish> 
  might have appeared before disappearance

* a comparable PDF, paginated, A4 landscape.

Both files are representative of the four commits that I made to the page after the April 2023 capture in the Wayback Machine, <https://web.archive.org/web/20230419231932/https://www.freebsd.org/publish/>. 


> … Click any image to see a larger version. …

If I can enhance the PDF to reach the larger versions of images that remain on the FreeBSD Project website, I will. 

----

In the meantime: 

* at least one is in the Wayback Machine, 
  <https://web.archive.org/web/20230112172000/https://www.freebsd.org/gifs/jpb.jpg>

* you can manually edit URLs after clicking within the current edition of 
  the PDF, so, for example, 

       <http://localhost:1313/gifs/jpb.jpg> can become 
     <https://www.freebsd.org/gifs/jpb.jpg>.

I hope that no future change will make these image files unavailable.
